title: MEGA BLOKS First Builders Toddler Building Blocks Toy Set, ABC Learning Train with 60 Pieces, Ages 1+ Years, DXH35
features: Introduce Toddlers to ABCs Blocks feature all the letters A through Z to learn the alphabet
Easy-to-Build Train 60 pieces include big building blocks and rolling wheelbases
Easy to Grip, Stack, & Pull Apart Our blocks are designed specifically for toddlers' little hands
Compatible with Other Name Brands Combine stacking toys for endless big building fun
For Preschoolers Ages 1+ - Big blocks help to develop creativity, imagination, and fine motor skills
description: From the manufacturer ​Build Letter & Color Skills Little builders can build an alphabet rainbow with ABC blocks. ​Great Gift for Toddlers Easy-to-build learning train with letters A through Z. ​Build & Play Toddlers can hop on the fast track to learning ABCs with an alphabet adventure. ​Inspire creativity with the First Builders ABC Learning Train designed for little hands and growing minds. ​
